{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Fox Dream Ruler
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Fox Dream]] [[Ruler technique]] is intended to disrupt the [[dream aura]] in a person's mind.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
